overall.description: First-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city during golden hour. The player moves from an industrial covered walkway through a commercial market area, crosses a street with futuristic vehicles, and continues along a modern business district. The scene features ray-traced lighting, neon signs, and a mix of industrial and modern architecture typical of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial covered walkway with construction barriers

events.description: slight left turn to follow the curved walkway path
leaving construction zone and entering commercial market area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through industrial covered walkway with construction barriers on both sides

notable_agents.action: person in red pants walking away from camera toward the light

entered.detail: red and white striped barriers with yellow and black caution tape blocking off areas
large circular industrial ventilation fans mounted on the ceiling
massive concrete overpass structure with exposed beams and pipes overhead

segments.scene_description: Walking through a dimly lit industrial covered walkway with construction barriers lining both sides of the path. Large industrial ventilation fans are visible overhead as the camera moves toward a brighter area ahead. The environment is sparse with minimal pedestrian activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with market stalls and palm trees

events.description: entering area with food stalls and increased pedestrian activity
approaching bright exit with strong golden hour sunlight streaming in

agents.ego_description: walking through commercial arcade passing food stalls and browsing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking ahead toward the bright exit

entered.detail: ramen shop and food vendors with warm interior lighting and signage
large potted palm trees in wooden planters lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a commercial covered walkway with food stalls on the left and potted palm trees in the center. More pedestrians are present, walking in the same direction toward the bright exit where sunlight streams in. The industrial fans are now closer overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and vehicle traffic

events.description: exiting covered walkway onto open street crosswalk with vehicle traffic
futuristic white sedan passes from left to right in front of crosswalk
crossing the street with a group of pedestrians while traffic waits

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at a covered intersection while observing passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: futuristic white sedan driving past the crosswalk from left to right
group of pedestrians crossing the street together toward the opposite side

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing with XING markings on asphalt
sleek futuristic vehicles with glowing accents parked along the curb
traffic light pole showing green walk signal

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway onto a street crosswalk with bright golden hour sunlight streaming through the open beam structure. A futuristic white car passes by on the left as the camera crosses the street with other pedestrians. The architecture shifts to open steel beams with views of the sky and surrounding buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern business district covered walkway with digital advertisements

events.description: pedestrian with cybernetic facial implants passes very close to camera temporarily blocking view
slight left turn to follow the curved walkway path along the building

agents.ego_description: walking along modern business district sidewalk passing digital advertisements and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with distinctive cybernetic facial implants and blonde hair passing close by
person in white lab coat and hat walking toward camera

entered.detail: tall modern building with reflective glass facade and vertical accent lighting
digital advertisement kiosk displaying BIG burrito commercial with bright colors
large illuminated signs and screens on building walls showing advertisements

segments.scene_description: Walking along a modern business district covered walkway with a sleek glass building on the left and digital advertisement kiosks on the right. The setting sun creates long shadows and warm backlighting. Various pedestrians pass by including one with prominent cybernetic facial implants who passes very close to the camera, and vehicles are visible on the street to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim industrial corridor into the vibrant, sun-drenched streets of a futuristic business district. It begins within a dimly lit covered walkway lined with construction barriers and overhead ventilation fans, moving steadily toward a brightening horizon. As the path opens, the environment shifts into a bustling commercial area filled with food stalls, potted palms, and a growing crowd of pedestrians. The camera then emerges from the shelter onto a street crosswalk, where the lighting transforms into brilliant golden hour sunlight and a sleek white futuristic car glides past. Finally, the scene transitions into a modern business district characterized by glass facades and digital kiosks, passing close to a citizen with cybernetic implants as long shadows stretch across the walkway.
